untranslatable_reason: Signal requires dealer inventory tracking and bid-ask spread monitoring, which are not available in the standard technical indicator set. 'Dealer long inventory position >= 60th percentile' and 'Bid-ask spread widened >= 125% of baseline' cannot be expressed with allowed indicators. 'Trade intensity skewed toward liquidity-demanding buy orders' also requires order flow microstructure data not in the allowed set.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using price discount (approximated as negative returns relative to -1.5%) and bid-ask spread expansion (approximated as vol_ratio_20 > 1.25, a proxy for liquidity tightening). However, the core microstructure conditions around dealer inventory and order flow cannot be reliably expressed with standard OHLCV indicators. This signal is fundamentally dependent on order book and dealer position data outside the scope of this indicator library.
